notes: Extended cases for iterative post-order traversal using one stack.

cases.name: sample_postorder_iterative_single_stack
expect_contains_all: The resulting post-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 10 18 15 25 80 50 20

cases.name: right_skewed_tree_postorder
expect_contains_all: The resulting post-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 40 30 20 10

cases.name: left_subtree_with_two_children_postorder
expect_contains_all: The resulting post-order traversal of the binary search tree is: 10 25 20 30
